reviews.comment:

Good restrooms and a kiosk with food, plus a restaurant with a grill (expensive prices)!

reviews.comment:
Pare en esa estación por ser del ACA. El Full Tiene de todo pero la atencion del que creo era el encargado deja mucho que desear, bastante descortes y muy engreido.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped at that station because it's an ACA station. The Full has everything, but the service from the person I think was in charge leaves much to be desired; quite rude and very arrogant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsN3FmMUxBEAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar y los baños están bien. Los precios de las comidas son un poco alto comparado con otras estaciones. Y deben tener cuidado con el estacionamiento porque debes en cuando hay ladrones con inhibidores de señales, que hacen que cuando trabes el auto este realmente no se trabe y después te roban todo lo de adentro. Siempre verifiquen que su auto este trabado, lo cuento por experiencia propia.

(Translated by Google)
The location and the bathrooms are fine. Food prices are a bit high compared to other stations. And you should be careful in the parking lot because there are thieves with jammers from time to time, which prevent you from locking your car and then steal everything inside. Always check that your car is locked; I can tell you this from my own experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsMnVXdzN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasó cuando viajo. Un rato para descansar y comer algo ligero. Hay de todo!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
It happened while I was traveling. A little while to rest and have a light meal. They have everything!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsdE9IRHhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Amplio, confortable y limpio. Todo lo que se necesita para hacer una pausa en el camino. Sumado el excelente servicio de Auxilio Mecánico del ACA que nos asistió con el desperfecto de nuestro vehículo.

(Translated by Google)
Spacious, comfortable, and clean. Everything you need for a break on the road. Plus, the excellent roadside assistance from the ACA helped us with our vehicle breakdown.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNseU5hOXpRRRAB
